message:
chore: refresh Cargo.lock for fsqlite dep tree

Routine `cargo update` / transitive resolution refresh. No direct
dependency manifest changes.

Observed diff:
- fsqlite-wal now records a dependency edge on fsqlite-vfs in the
  lock graph.
- fsqlite-pager now records a dependency edge on
  fsqlite-observability in the lock graph.

These reflect internal reorganization inside the frankensqlite
workspace that beads_rust pulls in transitively; our direct
dependency list and pinned versions are unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
